---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Research Use Case
Describe the bioacoustics research scenario where this would be useful.

## Proposed Solution
How you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches or tools you've looked at.

## Examples
Links to similar features in other bioacoustic software (Raven Pro, Praat, Sonic Visualiser, etc.)

## Implementation Ideas (optional)
If you have technical suggestions for implementation.

## Additional Context
Any other information about the feature request.

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a pull request
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I can test it
- [ ] No, requesting feature only
